title: ourisia macrophylla subsp. macrophylla
intro: Ourisia macrophylla subsp. macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ourisia macrophylla subsp. macrophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
